main_functions.description: Allows a user to create an account using an email and password, with validation and rate limiting.

sub_functions.description: Validates email format and uniqueness, and blocks disposable email domains.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that email addresses conforming to simplified RFC 5322 are accepted, and non-conforming formats are rejected with the specified error message 'Địa chỉ email không đúng định dạng. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.'
Verify that registration with email from known disposable email providers is rejected with an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).
Verify that duplicate email registration is rejected with the specified error message 'Email này đã được đăng ký. Vui lòng đăng nhập hoặc sử dụng email khác.'

sub_functions.description: Validates password complexity, length, and content rules.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that passwords between 8 and 64 characters are accepted, and passwords outside this range are rejected with the specified error message 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.'

Verify that passwords containing at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one special character are accepted; missing any required character type is rejected with an appropriate error message.
Verify that passwords containing spaces or the username are rejected with an appropriate error message.

sub_functions.description: Enforces rate limit on account creation attempts per IP address.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that up to 5 account creation attempts per IP within a 15-minute rolling window are allowed, and the 6th attempt is blocked with an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).
Verify that after the 15-minute rolling window expires, the IP can attempt account creation again (e.g., the 6th attempt succeeds if made after the window resets).

sub_functions.description: Handles race conditions when multiple registration requests are made from the same IP simultaneously.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that simultaneous registration requests from the same IP are handled correctly, ensuring no duplicate accounts are created and rate limit is enforced consistently.

main_functions.description: Handles sending verification email, resend requests, login blocking until verified, and expired link handling.

sub_functions.description: Generates a unique verification link valid for 24 hours.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the verification link is valid for 24 hours and expires after that time, preventing verification after expiry.
Verify that each registration generates a unique verification link that is not reused across different accounts or registrations.
Verify that the verification link is resistant to tampering (e.g., token manipulation, replay attacks) and that using a modified or reused link does not verify the account.

sub_functions.description: Allows user to request resend of verification email with cooldown and rate limiting.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that a resend request is allowed only once every 60 seconds per account, and a request within the cooldown period is blocked with an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).

Verify that after 3 resend requests within a 1-hour rolling window, the resend feature is locked for 30 minutes for the IP or account, and subsequent requests are blocked with an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).

Verify that attempting to resend during the 30-minute lockout period (after exceeding the rate limit) is blocked with an appropriate error message, distinct from the rate limit exceeded message if applicable.

sub_functions.description: Blocks login attempts for accounts that have not completed email verification.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that an unverified account cannot log in and receives an appropriate error message.
Verify that after successful email verification, the account can log in successfully.

sub_functions.description: Handles behavior when an expired verification link is used, and allows user to request a new link via resend.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that clicking an expired verification link (older than 24 hours) results in an appropriate error message and does not verify the account.
Verify that after the verification link expires, the user can request a new verification link via the resend mechanism (subject to cooldown and rate limits).

sub_functions.description: Handles scenarios where the external email delivery service fails to send the verification email.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that if the external email delivery service fails, the system handles the failure gracefully (e.g., logs the error, does not create a verified account, and may notify the user or support).

main_functions.description: Ensures that all specified error messages are returned correctly for validation and rate limit failures.

sub_functions.description: Verifies that validation error messages match the specified requirements.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that attempting to register with an already used email returns the exact error message: 'Email này đã được đăng ký. Vui lòng đăng nhập hoặc sử dụng email khác.'
Verify that entering a password outside the 8-64 character range returns the exact error message: 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.'
Verify that entering an email with invalid format returns the exact error message: 'Địa chỉ email không đúng định dạng. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.'
Verify that entering an email from a disposable domain returns an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements, but must be present and consistent).

sub_functions.description: Verifies that rate limit error messages are returned when limits are exceeded.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that exceeding the account creation rate limit (5 per IP per 15 minutes) returns an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).
Verify that requesting a resend within 60 seconds returns an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).

test_categories.category_name: Resend Rate Limit Exceeded Error Message
test_categories.test_intent: Verify that exceeding the resend rate limit (3 per hour) returns an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements).

Verify that attempting to resend during the 30-minute lockout period returns an appropriate error message (exact message not specified in requirements), which may differ from the rate limit exceeded message.

main_functions.description: Handles account lifecycle events such as cleanup of unverified accounts and potential re-registration with the same email after expiry.

sub_functions.description: Handles the lifecycle of unverified accounts, including potential deletion or expiration after a certain period (not specified in requirements, but assumed for data management).

test_categories.category_name: Re-registration with Same Email After Verification Link Expiry
test_categories.test_intent: Verify that after the verification link expires (24 hours), the user can request a new verification link via resend, but cannot re-register with the same email unless the account is deleted or the system allows it (behavior not fully specified; test to confirm system behavior).
